# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: application
description: A simple Helm chart for application deployment
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0.0"

---
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: nginx
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
  tag: "1.25"

nameOverride: ""
fullnameOverride: ""

service:
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

resources: {}

nodeSelector: {}

tolerations: []

affinity: {}

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ include "application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "application.name" . }}
    helm.sh/chart: {{ include "application.chart" . }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "application.name" . }}
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "application.name" . }}
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: {{ include "application.name" . }}
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          imagePullPolicy: {{ .Values.image.pullPolicy }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          {{- with .Values.resources }}
          resources:
            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
          {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
      nodeSelector:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.affinity }}
      affinity:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}
      {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
      tolerations:
        {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}
      {{- end }}

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ include "application.fullname" . }}
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "application.name" . }}
    helm.sh/chart: {{ include "application.chart" . }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: {{ .Release.Service }}
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  selector:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: {{ include "application.name" . }}
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: {{ .Release.Name }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      protocol: TCP
      name: http

---
{{- define "application.name" -}}
{{- default .Chart.Name .Values.nameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "application.fullname" -}}
{{- if .Values.fullnameOverride -}}
{{- .Values.fullnameOverride | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- else -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Release.Name (include "application.name" .) | trunc 63 | trimSuffix "-" -}}
{{- end -}}
{{- end -}}

{{- define "application.chart" -}}
{{- printf "%s-%s" .Chart.Name .Chart.Version | replace "+" "_" -}}
{{- end -}}
